hot_topics.topic: Log file disk space explosion (dual reports)
hot_topics.note: Two separate reports: 17GB+ via hardcoded log path (#16142, 6 comments) and 26GB+ via auto-updater HTTP 418 retry loop (#15947). Both open, no fix merged.
29 sessions hard-deleted via internal API (soft:false). No recovery. Open since 2026-06-16.
App hangs unrecoverably when context is too large. 4 comments, no resolution.
Deleted messages in UI persist in Claude Code SDK .jsonl transcript. Ghost messages reappear on --resume. Opened today.

hot_topics.note: Quick Assist silently skips MCP/tool calls — core integration broken.
advisor-tool-2026-03-01 beta header causing 400 rejections — should be removed from aiCore.

Three CRITICAL disk/data-loss bugs remain open with no fix merged. 1 new critical bug filed today (#16300). Dev velocity high: ~146 PRs merged to main in 30 days, v2 page-carve sprint underway.
